{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2025-62233", "cvss": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-502", "name": "Deserialization of Untrusted Data"}], "description": "Deserialization of Untrusted Data vulnerability in Apache DolphinScheduler RPC module.

This issue affects Apache DolphinScheduler: 

Version >= 3.2.0 and < 3.3.1.

Attackers who can access the Master or Worker nodes can compromise the system by creating a StandardRpcRequest, injecting a malicious class type into it, and sending RPC requests to the DolphinScheduler Master/Worker nodes.
Users are recommended to upgrade to version [3.3.1], which fixes the issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00537, "percentile": 0.41563}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-f786-9c63-8xr8", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-05T00:06:35Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f786-9c63-8xr8", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-f786-9c63-8xr8"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2025-62233"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-24T11:16:21Z", "published_at": "2026-04-24T12:30:27Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-62233", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/79s80h51r4z5d4l2xs5xy364rmmo1bw0", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/04/24/2", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f786-9c63-8xr8"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/dolphinscheduler", "summary": "Apache DolphinScheduler RPC module has a Deserialization of Untrusted Data vulnerability", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-05T00:06:37Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-f786-9c63-8xr8", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.3.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.apache.dolphinscheduler:dolphinscheduler"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.2.0, < 3.3.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.3.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.apache.dolphinscheduler:dolphinscheduler-rpc"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.2.0, < 3.3.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Apache DolphinScheduler RPC module has a Deserialization of Untrusted Data vulnerability
